title: Convenient Minecraft
description: Adds Minecraft features that make the game convenient.
body:
Adds Minecraft features that make the game convenient.

Bows can have infinity and mending

Stackable potions and stews, bucket, shulker boxes

Better stair crafting recipes (3 blocks for 4 stairs)

Better trapdoor crafting recipes (gives 6 trapdoors)

Death coordinates (display coordinates after death)

Husks drop sand

Pickaxe that automatically smelts ores

No more too expensive

Glass drops

Trident crafting recipe

Faster minecarts with copper rails
